tense_aspect_mood.name: IPFV
tense_aspect_mood.function: imperfective aspect (ongoing or unbounded action in nonpast or past context)

voice_valence.name: PASS
voice_valence.function: passive (demotes agent, promotes patient or theme)

voice_valence.name: APPL
voice_valence.function: applicative (promotes oblique participant such as beneficiary, instrument, or location to core object)

derivational.name: AGENT_N
derivational.function: agentive (one who habitually or characteristically does X)

derivational.name: RESULT_N
derivational.function: resultative noun (product or outcome of doing X)

derivational.name: ABSTR_N
derivational.function: abstract noun (state, process, or quality of doing X)

derivational.name: QUAL_ADJ
derivational.function: relational/possessive adjective (having or characterized by X)

derivational.name: DIM_N
derivational.function: diminutive or affectionate noun (smaller, endearing X)

tense_aspect_mood.name: PST
tense_aspect_mood.function: past tense (binary past vs nonpast; nonpast is unmarked)

tense_aspect_mood.name: IPFV
tense_aspect_mood.function: imperfective aspect (ongoing or internal view of the event)

voice_valence.name: PASS
voice_valence.function: passive voice (demotes agent, promotes patient to core argument)

voice_valence.name: CAUS
voice_valence.function: causative (introduces a causer, causes someone to do X)

voice_valence.name: APPL
voice_valence.function: applicative (promotes a benefactive/locative/instrumental to core object)

derivational.name: ACT_N
derivational.function: eventive noun (the act or process of doing X)

derivational.name: RES_N
derivational.function: result noun (thing produced or affected by X)

derivational.name: REL_ADJ
derivational.function: relational adjective (pertaining to, associated with the noun)

derivational.name: CAP_ADJ
derivational.function: adjective meaning capable or suitable for doing X
